goal_instruction: You are on the HarborCare Provider Portal. Reach the Prior Authorization Escalation Worksheet page.

provider_home.title: HarborCare Provider Portal
provider_home.text: HarborCare Provider Portal supports clinical teams with authorizations, claims, provider policies, and urgent case workflows.

links.label: Authorizations
links.preview_text: Prior auth status, requests, and escalations.

links.label: Claims and Appeals
links.preview_text: Claim corrections, reconsiderations, and appeals.

links.label: Coverage Policies
links.preview_text: Medical necessity and plan policy documents.

authorizations.title: Authorizations
authorizations.text: Authorizations includes new requests, status checks, peer-to-peer support, and escalation resources for urgent prior auth cases.

links.label: Prior Authorization Center
links.preview_text: Status, submissions, missing documentation, and urgent escalations.

links.label: Claims and Appeals
links.preview_text: Claim review and formal appeal workflows.

links.label: Authorization Policies
links.preview_text: Medical review criteria and authorization rules.

prior_authorization_center.title: Prior Authorization Center
prior_authorization_center.text: Use the Prior Authorization Center for status checks, urgent requests, peer-to-peer review, and clinical escalation support.

links.label: Status and Documentation
links.preview_text: Check pending cases and submit missing clinical notes.

links.label: Exception and Escalation Requests
links.preview_text: Case exceptions, urgent escalation, and escalation forms.

links.label: Coverage Policies
links.preview_text: Review plan coverage rules before escalating.

exception_escalation_requests.title: Exception and Escalation Requests
exception_escalation_requests.text: Submit network exceptions, urgent case escalations, medical necessity escalations, and prior authorization escalation forms.

links.label: Clinical Escalation Forms
links.preview_text: Clinical review escalation forms by workflow type.

links.label: Network Exception Request
links.preview_text: Out-of-network exception submissions.

links.label: Appeals Intake
links.preview_text: Formal appeals after a claim or auth denial.

clinical_escalation_forms.title: Clinical Escalation Forms
clinical_escalation_forms.text: Clinical escalation forms cover peer-to-peer escalation, expedited review, prior authorization escalation, and inpatient review exceptions.

links.label: Prior Authorization Escalation
links.preview_text: Forms and worksheets for escalating an existing prior auth request.

links.label: Peer-to-Peer Escalation
links.preview_text: Schedule physician reviewer discussions.

links.label: Exception and Escalation Requests
links.aria_label: Return to exception and escalation requests
links.preview_text: Back to the escalation request hub.

prior_auth_escalation.title: Prior Authorization Escalation
prior_auth_escalation.text: Prior Authorization Escalation includes the escalation checklist, required attachments, worksheet, and submission deadlines.

links.label: Prior Authorization Escalation Worksheet
links.preview_text: Worksheet required for urgent prior authorization escalation review.

links.label: Escalation Submission Checklist
links.preview_text: Checklist for documents and contact details before submission.

links.label: Clinical Escalation Forms
links.preview_text: Back to the clinical escalation forms index.

claims_appeals.title: Claims and Appeals
claims_appeals.text: Claims and Appeals supports reconsiderations, corrected claims, denial appeals, and payment dispute intake.

links.label: Appeals Intake
links.preview_text: Formal post-decision appeals for denials and disputes.

links.label: Corrected Claims
links.preview_text: Resubmit or correct a claim.

coverage_policies.title: Coverage Policies
coverage_policies.text: Coverage Policies provides medical necessity policies, payer bulletins, and procedure-specific authorization criteria.

links.label: Authorizations
links.preview_text: Return to authorization workflows.

authorization_policies.title: Authorization Policies
authorization_policies.text: Authorization policies explain when urgent review is allowed and which escalation channels apply.

links.label: Prior Authorization Center
links.preview_text: Back to status and escalation support.

status_and_documentation.title: Status and Documentation
status_and_documentation.text: Check pending case status, upload missing notes, and confirm whether a request is eligible for escalation.

links.label: Prior Authorization Center
links.preview_text: Back to prior auth tools.

network_exception_request.title: Network Exception Request
network_exception_request.text: Submit out-of-network care exception requests when no in-network option is available.

links.label: Exception and Escalation Requests
links.aria_label: Return to exception and escalation requests
links.preview_text: Back to the escalation request hub.

appeals_intake.title: Appeals Intake
appeals_intake.text: Submit provider appeals after a claim or prior authorization decision has already been finalized.

links.label: Claims and Appeals
links.preview_text: Back to claims and appeals overview.

corrected_claims.title: Corrected Claims
corrected_claims.text: Resubmit claims with corrected coding or billing information.

links.label: Claims and Appeals
links.preview_text: Back to claims and appeals overview.

peer_review_escalation.title: Peer-to-Peer Escalation
peer_review_escalation.text: Request a peer reviewer conversation for a clinical decision still under review.

links.label: Clinical Escalation Forms
links.preview_text: Back to the escalation forms list.

escalation_submission_checklist.title: Escalation Submission Checklist
escalation_submission_checklist.text: Checklist covering required chart notes, ordering physician details, and authorization reference numbers.

links.label: Prior Authorization Escalation
links.preview_text: Back to the escalation overview.

prior_auth_escalation_worksheet.title: Prior Authorization Escalation Worksheet
prior_auth_escalation_worksheet.text: This page contains the worksheet required for urgent prior authorization escalation review.
